programmes.show_description: ...For Murder: Crime mystery starring Jewel. When Shannon finds a body in the house she's been hired to renovate, can this unlikely sleuth dust off the clues and crack a murder case too? (2017)
...Something New: Crime mystery prequel Skyler Samuels. A young Aurora Teagarden returns home to Lawrenceton after college, only to find herself embroiled in the mystery that started it all. (2023)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Tense psychological thriller with Annika Foster. A woman falls for a handsome firefighter who saves her life, but soon discovers that his overprotective nature can get obsessive - and deadly. (2021)
Tense thriller starring Kristina Klebe. A recently widowed woman grows suspicious of her insular son's new friend. Could his seemingly strange obsession with her turn sinister (2019)?

A Passion for Murder: Dr Sloan becomes embroiled in a murder investigation when the wife of the hospital's chief of staff is shot dead.
Poisoned In Paradise: When a waitress is poisoned after seeking his help, can ex-cop Jeff Jackson unravel what she had been trying to warn him about? (2021)
School For Murder: Can Jessica discover who killed the new headmaster of a Cabot Cove prep school?
Another Killing In Cork: Can Jessica help to prove her friend's innocence during her stay at his fishing lodge in Ireland?
Game, Set, Murder: Can Jessica help a young tennis player haunted by disturbing visions?
Nailed: Jessica investigates the murder of a financier whose body is found in her friend's fashionable beauty salon.
A Quaking In Aspen: Jessica investigates the suspicious death of her friend's husband during a trip to Aspen, Colorado. Can she and Charlie Garret unearth the truth?
The Secret Of Gila Junction: Jessica helps an inexperienced sheriff investigate a major crime spree in a small town in Arizona.
Big Easy Murder: Jessica investigates a series of murders during a research trip to New Orleans.
Home Care: Jessica's return to Cabot Cove is marred by a personal tragedy.
Nan's Ghost Part 1: Will a ghost story lead Jessica to danger or ancient treasure during a trip to Ireland? Part 1 of 2.
Nan's Ghost Part 2: Concluding episode. Can Jessica escape the prison of Ballynook Castle and find a murderer? Part 2 of 2.
...Death At The Diner: Aurora's investigation strays a little too close to home when the owner of the diner she works in is killed and her boyfriend is the main suspect. (2024)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

...Ground: Heartfelt mystery starring Eric Mabius. The Postables race against time to reunite two lovers, all while navigating personal challenges and the aftermath of Hurricane Katrina. (2017)
